item.title: Category - Language Learning Apps
item.description: Category - Language Learning Apps Mobile apps for learning languages through gamified lessons, AI tutoring, and native speaker conversation.

item.title: Source - LingoBright Language Learning Apps Statistics 2026
item.description: Source - LingoBright Language Learning Apps Statistics 2026 Comprehensive statistics compilation for language learning app market.

item.title: Source - Business of Apps Language Learning App Market 2026
item.description: Source - Business of Apps Language Learning App Market 2026 Business of Apps analysis of language learning app sector. $1.11B app revenue (2024).

item.title: Categories
item.description: Categories Fitness Activity Tracker Apps Focus Music Apps Habit Trackers Journaling Apps Language Learning Apps Meal Planning and Grocery Delivery Apps Meditation Apps Period Trackers Plant Care Apps Receipt Scanner and Expense Tracking Apps Sleep Apps 11 note(s) as of 2026-04-20.

item.title: Category - Fitness Activity Tracker Apps
item.description: Category - Fitness Activity Tracker Apps 460M global users projected for 2026.

item.title: Category - Focus Music Apps
item.description: Category - Focus Music Apps AI-generated and adaptive music apps designed to induce and maintain focused mental states.

item.title: Category - Habit Trackers
item.description: Category - Habit Trackers Mobile apps for building and tracking daily habits and routines.

item.title: Category - Journaling Apps
item.description: Category - Journaling Apps Mobile apps for capturing daily reflections, moods, and life events through text, voice, photos, and video.

item.title: Category - Meal Planning and Grocery Delivery Apps
item.description: Category - Meal Planning and Grocery Delivery Apps Apps for planning what to eat (meal planning) and getting ingredients (grocery delivery).

item.title: Category - Meditation Apps
item.description: Category - Meditation Apps Mobile apps delivering guided meditation, mindfulness training, and sleep content.
